text_query: best high-refresh-rate gaming monitor to take advantage of an NVIDIA RTX 4080
reasonings: A standard 1080p 120Hz TV with no NVIDIA G-Sync support does not serve as a high-refresh-rate gaming monitor for a RTX 4080.
240Hz, G-Sync compatible gaming monitor directly suited for pairing with a high-end NVIDIA GPU.
4K 144Hz Nano IPS monitor with G-Sync compatibility is an ideal high-refresh-rate match for an RTX 4080.
QHD 165Hz Nano IPS gaming monitor is a strong high-refresh-rate option for a powerful GPU.
144Hz QHD gaming monitor with FreeSync is well suited for high-performance gaming with the RTX 4080.
